{{#extend "layout"}} {{#replace "title"}} {{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.title"}} {{/replace}} {{#replace "body"}}
{{#if isMobileOnlyStudy}} {{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.mobileInstructions" study_name=study_name}}}

{{#if appleStore}} {{/if}} {{#if googleStore}} {{/if}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.codeInstructions"}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.accessCode"}}
{{access_code}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.pushNotificationsInstructions"}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.thankYou"}} {{else if isWebOnlyStudy}} {{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.webInstructions" study_name=study_name}}}



{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.codeInstructions"}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.accessCode"}}
{{access_code}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.browserLink"}}
{{paweb_url}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.thankYou"}} {{else}} {{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.mobileInstructions" study_name=study_name}}}

{{#if appleStore}} {{/if}} {{#if googleStore}} {{/if}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.codeInstructions"}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.accessCode"}}
{{access_code}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.pushNotificationsInstructions"}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.browserLink"}}
{{paweb_url}}

{{i18n "axon:template.email.c_axon_new_caregiver_invite.thankYou"}} {{/if}}
{{/replace}} {{/extend}}
